items.name: Immortal hat: Emerald Echo hat
items.description:
The Emerald Echo radiates vibrant energy, like a fresh breeze through ancient forests. Its gleaming green finish shifts like sunlight over leaves, symbolizing growth, clarity, and confidence. The silver band adds balance and polish, elevating your style while keeping things grounded. Whether you're wandering city streets or standing out in a crowd, this fedora is your call to lead with calm charisma and sharp presence. A timeless piece for those who let their style speak before words do.

Price: 799/10 stock
Purchase Game: https://www.roblox.com/games/73736600148167

items.name: Builders Club
items.description:
Clean, sharp, and full of builder heritage — the White & Black Outrageous Builders Club Hard Hat brings vintage BC era flair with a crisp twist. With its clean white shell contrasted by bold black accents and the iconic oversized visor, it’s perfect for retro avatars, throwback construction roleplay, and collectors chasing golden-era Roblox gear.

⚙️ More Retro Builder Hats:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=hard+hat&Category=11&CreatorName=Classic+Limiteds&salesTypeFilter=1

✅ Join the Group:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/12034553/Classic-Limiteds#!/about

🏛️ Classic Limiteds
